title_en: Government announces restructuring of Alberta Health Services into four separate entities
title_fr: Le gouvernement annonce la restructuration d'Alberta Health Services en quatre entités distinctes
description_en: The government announces Alberta Health Services will be restructured into four separate entities covering acute care, mental health and addictions, primary care, and continuing care. Health critics warn the structure creates conditions for incremental privatization.

update_log.note: Source upgraded: R-074 (govt page) replaced with R-094 (CBC/Janet French Nov 8 2023 — Tier 2). Leaked documents showed govt planned to sell CapitalCare and Carewest.
